code: import _objectSpread from"/Users/rameshm/Downloads/sahara/frontend/node_modules/@babel/runtime/helpers/esm/objectSpread2.js";import axios from'axios';const BASE='http://localhost:5000/api';export const createUser=data=>axios.post("".concat(BASE,"/users"),data);export const sendChat=data=>axios.post("".concat(BASE,"/chat"),data);export const getTasks=userId=>axios.get("".concat(BASE,"/tasks/").concat(userId));export const updateTask=(userId,taskIndex,status,notes)=>axios.put("".concat(BASE,"/tasks/").concat(userId),{taskIndex,status,notes});export const generateDocument=(type,userData)=>axios.post("".concat(BASE,"/documents/generate"),_objectSpread({type},userData),{responseType:'blob'});
